message:
refactor: replace per-agent tools with single delegate tool

Instead of creating one tool definition per delegatable agent (which
invalidates prompt cache when agents change), use a single "delegate"
tool with agent_name/goal/hints parameters. Agent descriptions are
rendered into the system prompt's <agents> block, keeping the tool
list stable across genome mutations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
